title: Services layer: organized analytics, LSP, policy, remote-config
description:
CC has services/ with ~20 discrete services (analytics w/ GrowthBook, LSP manager, policy enforcement, remote settings, extractMemories, sessionIngress, contentReplacement store). OC has ad-hoc equivalents scattered across modules.

## Scope
- src/services/ module directory
- Analytics sink trait (events: tengu_thinking, tool_use, session_start, etc.)
- LSP manager service (spawns language servers on demand)
- Policy service (enterprise managed-settings enforcement)
- Remote config / feature-flag service

## References
- /home/doll/claude-code/services/analytics/
- /home/doll/claude-code/services/api/
- /home/doll/claude-code/services/extractMemories/
